import { argsOrArgArray } from '../util/argsOrArgArray'; import { onErrorResumeNext as oERNCreate } from '../observable/onErrorResumeNext'; export function onErrorResumeNextWith(...sources) { const nextSources = argsOrArgArray(sources); return (source) => oERNCreate(source, ...nextSources); } export const onErrorResumeNext = onErrorResumeNextWith; //# sourceMappingURL=onErrorResumeNextWith.js.map
